doc: Stepper represents a component to display and control progress stepwise.

5.name: SimpleText
5.doc: Progress text for the simple layout, for example 'Schritt %d von %d'

7.name: Lines
7.doc: If false, the stepper will render without lines in simple and simple list layouts. Default: true.

8.name: CompletedText
8.doc: Text for completed stepper in simple layout, for example 'Alle %d Schritte abgeschlossen'
